list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: disable phone verification flow and update UI to reflect SMS coming soon
- Remove phone OTP sending and verification logic from backend; log SMS-disabled message instead - Update frontend verify contact page to hide phone verification form and display "Coming soon" message - Require only email verification for access in ContactVerificationFilter

project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "Application.BackendApplication.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.All in benjamin-savings-seed.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.All in charles-savings-seeder.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.All in dashboard-test.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.dashboard-test | Login as Admin (Run this first to get the token).executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "project.structure.last.edited": "SDKs", "project.structure.proportion": "0.0", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.0", "rest.client.default.execution.environment": "stag", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "ts.external.directory.path": "C:\\Program Files\\JetBrains\\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3\\plugins\\javascript-plugin\\jsLanguageServicesImpl\\external", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

entry.key: dashboard-test | Login as Admin (Run this first to get the token)

configuration.name: dashboard-test | Login as Admin (Run this first to get the token)
configuration.executionIdentifier: Login as Admin (Run this first to get the token)

item.itemvalue: HTTP Request.dashboard-test | Login as Admin (Run this first to get the token)

task.summary: Default task
chore(deploy): use environment variable for staging frontend URL and add SSH passphrase; update MPESA_ENV default in prod compose

chore(ci+deploy): cache OWASP NVD DB for faster scans; improve staging env var handling and .env generation
- Cache OWASP Dependency Check NVD database in CI, reducing scan time by using weekly cache keys and incremental updates - Pass additional environment variables to staging deploy for full .env generation, including MPESA and admin credentials - Generate .env on staging server using printf for reliability and completeness - Add deploy directory bootstrap step to ensure target exists before SCP - Refactor rollback and notification steps for clarity
chore(ci+deploy): clarify NVD cache logic; fix docker-compose strip_components in staging deploy

chore(deploy): improve staging deploy speed and reliability; clarify compose comments
- Set docker compose up to use --no-wait for faster SSH steps - Move backend healthcheck to dedicated CI step to avoid SSH timeouts - Adjust frontend depends_on to service_started for non-blocking startup - Add command_timeout to SSH steps for robust deployment and rollback - Refine and clarify comments in deploy-staging.yml and docker-compose.prod.yml
chore(deploy): remove --no-wait from docker compose up in staging deploy and rollback steps
chore(config): disable mail health check in production profile
fix(setup): prevent silent bypass on setup status fetch error by marking setup as incomplete
fix: disable mail health indicator to unblock staging deploy
chore: move OWASP scan to weekly schedule, unblock CI pipeline
fix(auth): guard against invalid /auth/me response to prevent treating HTML as user data
fix(auth): return user or null from fetchCurrentUser and improve invalid response handling
fix(api): allow configurable API base URL via VITE_API_BASE_URL env variable
fix(api): append /api/v1 to VITE_API_BASE_URL for consistent base URL handling
fix: read CORS allowed-origins from FRONTEND_URL env var instead of hardcoded value
fix: set session cookie domain for cross-subdomain auth on staging
fix: proxy API requests through nginx and update API base URL handling for staging
fix: add mail server environment variables to production docker compose
fix: add mail server environment variables to production docker compose
fix: improve journal entries API response parsing for safer type handling
fix: update nginx API proxy to route /api requests directly to backend root and clarify config comments
fix: ensure totalOverdue and totalShortfall calculations handle undefined data content safely
fix: handle non-array account API responses safely in chart of accounts page and API client
fix: update frontend build arg to use absolute API base URL in staging deployment
fix: update frontend build arg to use absolute API base URL in staging deployment
chore: add migration HTTP request logs, cookies, and response samples for historical savings import
chore: migrate outgoing email configuration to use Resend API and update deployment scripts
fix: update mail configuration to enable SMTP SSL and disable STARTTLS in production compose file
fix: update mail configuration to enable SMTP SSL and disable STARTTLS in production compose file
chore: remove SMTP mail configuration and migrate email sending to Resend HTTP API

feat: disable phone verification flow and update UI to reflect SMS coming soon
- Remove phone OTP sending and verification logic from backend; log SMS-disabled message instead - Update frontend verify contact page to hide phone verification form and display "Coming soon" message - Require only email verification for access in ContactVerificationFilter

MESSAGE.value:
chore(deploy): improve staging deploy speed and reliability; clarify compose comments
- Set docker compose up to use --no-wait for faster SSH steps - Move backend healthcheck to dedicated CI step to avoid SSH timeouts - Adjust frontend depends_on to service_started for non-blocking startup - Add command_timeout to SSH steps for robust deployment and rollback - Refine and clarify comments in deploy-staging.yml and docker-compose.prod.yml
chore(deploy): remove --no-wait from docker compose up in staging deploy and rollback steps
chore(config): disable mail health check in production profile
fix(setup): prevent silent bypass on setup status fetch error by marking setup as incomplete
fix: disable mail health indicator to unblock staging deploy
chore: move OWASP scan to weekly schedule, unblock CI pipeline
fix(auth): guard against invalid /auth/me response to prevent treating HTML as user data
fix(auth): return user or null from fetchCurrentUser and improve invalid response handling
fix(api): allow configurable API base URL via VITE_API_BASE_URL env variable
fix(api): append /api/v1 to VITE_API_BASE_URL for consistent base URL handling
fix: read CORS allowed-origins from FRONTEND_URL env var instead of hardcoded value
fix: set session cookie domain for cross-subdomain auth on staging
fix: proxy API requests through nginx and update API base URL handling for staging
fix: add mail server environment variables to production docker compose
fix: improve journal entries API response parsing for safer type handling
fix: update nginx API proxy to route /api requests directly to backend root and clarify config comments
fix: ensure totalOverdue and totalShortfall calculations handle undefined data content safely
fix: handle non-array account API responses safely in chart of accounts page and API client
fix: update frontend build arg to use absolute API base URL in staging deployment
chore: add migration HTTP request logs, cookies, and response samples for historical savings import
chore: migrate outgoing email configuration to use Resend API and update deployment scripts
fix: update mail configuration to enable SMTP SSL and disable STARTTLS in production compose file
chore: remove SMTP mail configuration and migrate email sending to Resend HTTP API
feat: auto-confirm email verification if token is present in URL on verify contact page

feat: disable phone verification flow and update UI to reflect SMS coming soon
- Remove phone OTP sending and verification logic from backend; log SMS-disabled message instead - Update frontend verify contact page to hide phone verification form and display "Coming soon" message - Require only email verification for access in ContactVerificationFilter

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: disable phone verification flow and update UI to reflect SMS coming soon
- Remove phone OTP sending and verification logic from backend; log SMS-disabled message instead - Update frontend verify contact page to hide phone verification form and display "Coming soon" message - Require only email verification for access in ContactVerificationFilter
